column2: PDP SEO - Meta Tags and Open Graph Tags
column7: Product exists with SEO info configured (meta title and description set in admin)
column9:
[NAV] Navigate to a product detail page on {{FRONT_URL}} (e.g., a product with known SEO data)
[WAIT] Wait for PDP to fully render
[ACT] Open browser DevTools Elements panel
[ASSERT] Inspect <head> section for meta tags
[ASSERT] Verify meta title tag matches product name or configured SEO title
[ASSERT] Verify meta description tag is present and non-empty
[ASSERT] Verify canonical URL tag is present and points to correct PDP URL
[ASSERT] Verify og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url tags are present
[ASSERT] Verify og:image points to a valid product image URL
column10:
[DOM] <title> or meta[name=title] matches product SEO title
[DOM] meta[name=description] is present with meaningful content (not empty or placeholder)
[DOM] link[rel=canonical] present with href matching current PDP URL (no query params)
[DOM] meta[property=og:title] present and matches product name
[DOM] meta[property=og:description] present and non-empty
[DOM] meta[property=og:image] present with valid image URL
[DOM] meta[property=og:url] present and matches canonical URL
column11:
[NETWORK] og:image URL returns HTTP 200 (image is accessible)
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
column12: Meta title missing or showing generic site title; meta description empty; canonical URL absent or pointing to wrong page; og:tags missing; og:image returning 404; console TypeError

column2: Cross-Facet AND Logic - Multiple Facet Groups Combine Correctly
column7: Category page with multiple facet groups (e.g.
column8: Brand and Color) with overlapping product sets

[WAIT] Wait for facet panel to load

[WAIT] Wait for filtered results; note the result count as Count_A

[WAIT] Wait for results to update
[ASSERT] Verify result count returns to Count_A
[ASSERT] Verify only the Brand filter remains active
